description_long: This is a rectangular clutch-style handbag with a vibrant orange and white tie-dye pattern on the front side, featuring a small, three-dimensional elephant embellishment. The back side is a solid, light beige color, providing a stark contrast to the colorful front. The bag has a zipper closure running along the top edge, with a matching tie-dye wrist strap attached to one end for easy carrying. The overall form is slim and flat, making it suitable for carrying small personal items. The materials appear to be a combination of fabric and synthetic leather, with a soft, semi-structured body. The decorative elephant adds a playful and unique touch to the otherwise simple silhouette.
description: A slim, rectangular clutch handbag with an orange and white tie-dye front, beige back, and a 3D elephant embellishment, featuring a zipper closure and wrist strap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange and white tie-dye pattern with a prominent 3D elephant embellishment and the zipper with attached wrist strap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim, flat profile of the handbag and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain, light beige surface with no decorative elements, highlighting the contrast with the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the slim profile and the edge of the zipper closure.
attribute_strap_type: Single short wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached to zipper pull.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure along the top edge, with a metal zipper pull.
attribute_decorative_elements: Three-dimensional elephant embellishment on the front.
attribute_pattern: Orange and white tie-dye pattern on the front; plain beige on the back.
